zh.lifeSummary: Isabel於1265年出生在英國諾福爾可斯托克頓。她於1278年與John le Bigod結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1304年4月11日在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁澤特林頓享年39歲，埋葬在英國越可爾澤特林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabel于1265年出生在英国諾福爾可斯托克頓。她于1278年与John le Bigod结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1304年4月11日在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁澤特林頓享年39岁，埋葬在英国越可爾澤特林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle

The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Isabel was born in 1265, in Stockton, Norfolk, England. She married John le Bigod in 1278. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 11 April 1304, in Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Settrington, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabel est née en 1265, à Stockton, Norfolk, Angleterre. Elle a épousé John le Bigod en 1278. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 avril 1304, à Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Settrington, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Isabel wurde 1265 in Stockton, Norfolk, England geboren. Sie hat 1278 John le Bigod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. April 1304 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Settrington, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Isabel è nata il nel 1265 nel Stockton, Norfolk, England. Lei sposato John le Bigod nel 1278. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 aprile 1304, nel Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Settrington, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Of,, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルク
ja.Settrington, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアセットリントン
ja.Stockton, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクストクトン
ja.of, Stockton, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクストクトン
ja.lifeSummary: Isabelは1265年にイギリスノーフォルクストクトンで生まれた。1278年にJohn le Bigodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1304年4月11日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングセットリントンで39歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアセットリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel(은)는 1265년 영국 노르폴크 스톡턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1278년 John le Bigod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 4월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 세트링턴에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 세트링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabel nasceu em 1265, em Stockton, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John le Bigod em 1278. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de abril de 1304, em Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabel родилась в 1265 г. в местности стокктон, норфолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John le Bigod в 1278 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 11 апреля 1304 г. в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Isabel nació en 1265, en Stockton, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con John le Bigod en 1278. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de abril de 1304, en Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
